scope: small public content cleanup proposal only; no HTML edited

research_updates.finding: Owner in-game check says Tyrant does not award Steel. External Tyrant reward references emphasize Power Cores, vouchers, alloy, speedups, hero EXP, and normal resources rather than Steel.
research_updates.proposal_impact: Do not add Tyrant as a Steel source in hq.html. Treat existing site pages that describe Tyrant as a Steel source as follow-up correction candidates.

proposed_changes: Correct steel source priority without adding Tyrant.
Make HQ31-35 timer wording less absolute.
Soften strongest Sophia wording while preserving recommendation.
acceptance_checks: manual review: visible FAQ and JSON-LD FAQ answers match
manual review: no template/schema family drift
manual review: no new hq.html text describes Tyrant as a Steel source
safety: No public content, patch specs, backlog rows, manifests, PRs, or production files were modified by this proposal.
